marquee_details.full_text: ✦ You do not have to earn rest, care, comfort, or the oxygen you breathe ✦
segments: You do not have to earn rest, care, comfort, or the oxygen you breathe

marquee_details.full_text: ✦ Your worth is not measured by chores, productivity, pain tolerance, or how much your body can do today ✦
segments: Your worth is not measured by chores, productivity, pain tolerance, or how much your body can do today

marquee_details.full_text: ✦ Rest is care ✦ Stopping before you crash is care ✦ Letting the day be smaller is care ✦
segments: Stopping before you crash is care
Letting the day be smaller is care

marquee_details.full_text: ✦ Partial completion is still progress ✦ One field, one sentence, one tiny win, one next step — it all counts ✦
segments: One field, one sentence, one tiny win, one next step — it all counts

marquee_details.full_text: ✦ The schedule is here to support you, not control you ✦ Breaks, rescheduling, and bed-level options are allowed ✦
segments: The schedule is here to support you, not control you
Breaks, rescheduling, and bed-level options are allowed

marquee_details.full_text: ✦ Food, water, oxygen, meds-as-prescribed, rest, bathroom needs, and decompression are all real care ✦
segments: Food, water, oxygen, meds-as-prescribed, rest, bathroom needs, and decompression are all real care

marquee_details.full_text: ✦ Your story matters even when you only have one sentence, one song, one note, or one messy thought today ✦
segments: Your story matters even when you only have one sentence, one song, one note, or one messy thought today

marquee_details.full_text: ✦ Play is regulation too ✦ Fun, music, dice, games, fantasy worlds, and small joys do not need to be earned first ✦
segments: Fun, music, dice, games, fantasy worlds, and small joys do not need to be earned first

marquee_details.full_text: ✦ Comfort is not selfish ✦ Safe snacks, soft spaces, nerdy treasures, and reachable joy count ✦
segments: Safe snacks, soft spaces, nerdy treasures, and reachable joy count

positive_affirmations: Soft starts count, especially when the day has to begin from bed.
Asking for help is not failing. It is using the support that makes life more possible.
Your oxygen, chair, tools, reminders, and support needs are access, not weakness.
You do not have to push through pain to prove you are strong.
Your needs are real before they become emergencies.
Data is for kindness, not punishment. Tracking is information, not a grade.
Asking for reassurance is not being too much. It is reaching for safety.
You are a man in every room, in every body state, and in every kind of care.
You are loved as you are, not as a task list.
